EXTENSION.config.activate: Please activate the extension using the 'Activate' button in the bottom right of this screen.
EXTENSION.config.categoryWarning: Make sure your Twitch category is set to Slay the Spire 2, or the extension won't show up for viewers!
EXTENSION.config.inGameConnect: Go to your in-game settings menu to connect and configure the integration.
EXTENSION.config.title: Slay the Spire 2 Companion
EXTENSION.tutorial.hoverIndicator: Hover over the stream to inspect {{streamerName}}'s cards, relics and potions when you see this indicator:
EXTENSION.tutorial.title: Slay the Spire 2
EXTENSION.tutorial.voting: You'll also be able to vote on which cards {{streamerName}} should take as a reward, and where they should go next on the map.
